chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2786 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 15.04.2025 Mr. Shahjahan Shah, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that learned trial Court has acquitted the applicant of the charge by way of compromise vide order dated 21.03.2025. Copy of order dated 21.03.2025 has been placed on record. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. So far as the surety furnished in the instant criminal bail application is concerned, the same is no more required, office is directed to return the surety, after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
